Start a build
Work with me

The fit is strongest when correctness matters.

I do my best work on systems that need careful architecture, readable state, and a builder who can carry the work from framing through hardening.

Best fit Deep engineering, not broad volume work

I prefer focused projects where the technical decisions have real consequences for trust, money, or operations.

Strong fit
  • Trading infrastructure and operator tooling
  • Fintech products with ledger or payout complexity
  • Cross-platform systems that need one reliable source of truth
  • Existing products that need cleanup, stabilization, or architectural repair
Possible fit
  • Product surfaces that support a deeper internal system
  • Dashboards that need both technical clarity and strong presentation
  • Automation and internal tools where process drift is hurting the team
Not a fit
  • Generic brochure sites with no deeper engineering need
  • High-volume content work with little technical involvement
  • Projects that need a large retained team rather than a hands-on solo engineer
Start the conversation
SS Developers

I build trading, fintech, and data-heavy systems for teams that need the software to stay correct when the environment gets messy.
